description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a textured, green cover that mimics the look of worn leather. The front cover features a pixelated camouflage pattern in brown, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The book's title is prominently displayed in large, blocky, black letters on the front. The spine is also green with the same camouflage pattern and displays the title in a vertical orientation. The back cover is plain, with only the camouflage pattern visible and no additional text or imagery. The book's pages are visible from the top and sides, showing a typical off-white paper color.
description: A green, camouflage-patterned hardcover book with a pixelated texture and bold black title text on the front and spine.
description_view_0: Front cover view showing the green, textured surface with brown camouflage patches and large, blocky black title text.
description_view_1: Top edge view displaying the thickness of the book and the off-white pages sandwiched between the green covers.
description_view_2: Back cover view showing only the green textured surface with brown camouflage patches and no text.
description_view_3: Spine view with the green camouflage pattern and the book's title printed vertically in black.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is green with a camouflage pattern and features the title 'Farming: How To Guide' printed vertically in black, blocky text. There are no decorative elements or additional imagery.
